LanguageData.VFE_BasicFactories.description: Construct basic Corvega industrial works, including conveyors, buried transfer lines, hoppers, and entry-level automated equipment for a proper pre-War factory floor.
LanguageData.VFE_BasicFactories.label: Corvega basic works
LanguageData.VFE_ComplexFactories.description: Construct specialized Corvega industrial systems for component fabrication, alloy processing, and other high-end automated production lines.
LanguageData.VFE_ComplexFactories.label: Corvega advanced works
